owning_subsystem: workspace Cargo policy, xtask Rust tooling, shared telemetry bootstrap, and UI runtime entrypoints
non_goals: Do not redesign runtime contracts or schema versions.
Do not add direct UI coupling to services, workflows, or SurrealDB.
Do not replace existing visible warning paths in desktop_runtime with tracing-only diagnostics in this change set.
scope_in: Add root workspace profile settings for lean dev, opt-in debugging, and stripped release.
Add cargo xtask rust audit, clean, and trace workflows plus matching cargo aliases.
Implement read-only artifact audit reporting, optional timings capture, and targeted cleanup planning/apply flows.
Extend shared telemetry with runtime/environment models and browser/native tracing bootstrap helpers.
Wire site and desktop_tauri to initialize tracing bootstrap and emit initial lifecycle events.
Update contributor docs and execution artifacts for the new workflows.
scope_out: External cache backend adoption such as sccache or remote artifact reuse.
Repository-wide conversion of existing warning and error callsites to tracing.
Product-facing behavior changes unrelated to build hygiene or tracing bootstrap.
acceptance_criteria: Root workspace profiles encode the lean dev, debugging, and stripped release policy.
cargo xtask rust audit, clean, and trace exist with deterministic help and tests.
Audit output reports target usage, subtree breakdowns, dependency duplication and features context, and build-script rerun hygiene, with timings remaining opt-in.
Cleanup defaults to dry-run and requires explicit apply for destructive removal.
site installs wasm-compatible tracing alongside the panic hook, and desktop_tauri installs the native JSON tracing subscriber before host startup.
Existing desktop_runtime visible warning paths remain intact in this change set.
Repository docs describe the new commands, profile policy, and tracing bootstrap status accurately.
validation_artifacts: Passing xtask, telemetry, desktop_tauri, verify-repo, verify-ui, and ui-hardening output
Smoke output for cargo xtask rust audit, clean incremental, and trace desktop --dry-run
Committed task contract and execution plan under plans/136-rust-build-hygiene-tracing-baseline/
rollback_path: Revert the workspace profile policy, xtask command surface, telemetry bootstrap, UI entrypoint wiring, docs, and execution artifacts together so the repository returns to the previous build and diagnostics baseline.
